upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The draft isolates the parent bundled nonrectangularity into C_mid, n_mid, an endpoint witness, and Delta_mid_sym with a parent reduction.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add one more displayed corollary deriving the unequal-weight or unequal-lambda first-order perturbation of T_mid to make the relative-open phase less dependent on prose.
Add a sentence in Section 6 defining h ~_z l explicitly as adjacency in the unobserved ordinal coordinate within the observed cell.
Add a compact table comparing C_mid and Delta_mid_sym against LuZhangDing2020, DingLu2017, TongKahanHarhayLi2025, and the parent qid.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjectures 1 and 2 as the flagship kernels and Theorem 1 as inherited parent reduction.
